name: talking_head_duo_kids
scenario_text: Мирон рассказывает про 3 вещи, которые ему нравятся, и 3 вещи которые не нравятся

clip_candidates.reason: Engaging question setting up the topic of things liked about German education.
clip_candidates.visual_description: Young man with curly blonde hair sitting, looking at camera.

clip_candidates.reason: Highlights a positive aspect of German education – good teaching and knowledge acquisition.
clip_candidates.visual_description: Young man talking directly to the camera, gesturing slightly.

clip_candidates.reason: Relatable and slightly unexpected positive point about school food.
Specific cultural appreciation, showing a personal connection to the German language.
Engaging question setting up the topic of things disliked about German school.
clip_candidates.visual_description: Young man with curly blonde hair sitting, looking at camera.

clip_candidates.reason: Common student complaint about teachers, highly relatable.
clip_candidates.visual_description: Young man talking, making a slightly displeased face, then laughing.

clip_candidates.reason: Universal student complaint about excessive homework, highly relatable.
clip_candidates.visual_description: Young man talking, looking slightly annoyed.

clip_candidates.reason: Specific complaint about long school hours, interesting for comparison with other systems.
clip_candidates.visual_description: Young man talking, looking thoughtful and a bit tired.
